description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light wall panels, large windows, and a prominent garage at the front. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several evenly spaced trees, with a driveway leading to the street. The house includes multiple outdoor spaces, such as a small patio and a rooftop terrace. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some large picture windows and others smaller and more regularly spaced. The overall appearance is contemporary, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior panels, surrounded by trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and several trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, asymmetrical window placement, and the garage extending from the main structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, rooftop terrace, and additional outdoor spaces with more trees visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, side windows, and the continuation of the driveway and tree line.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, modern door, and direct access from the driveway, no porch or columns.
